prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年江南大学在天津市综合科类的最低录取位次分别为约9601名、10116名、10093名、10160名、10681名，整体呈现波动后移趋势。2021至2022年位次后移约515名，2022至2023年基本持平，2023至2024年略有后移，2024至2025年后移约521名，近两年后移幅度有所加大。2025年基准位次约10681名；该校在天津市综合科类的招生计划2021–2023年均为125人，2024–2025年缩减至123人，2026年（依据招生计划文件）进一步缩减至118人，较2025年减少5人，缩招约4.1%。招生计划连续两年缩减，对报考竞争产生一定收紧效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 江南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第65位、2022年第59位、2023年第60位、2024年第55位、2025年第51位、2026年第52位，整体处于全国前55名区间，办学实力和综合声誉稳步提升；该校在2023年高考周期内曾出现偏负面声誉信号（涉及学校管理回应），但2025–2026年周期内未出现明显负面舆情。抖音学校热度排名第71位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于中等水平，未出现高热关注或明显负面话题。历史投档异常记录中未见江南大学相关信号，录取走势相对平稳；江南大学拥有食品科学与工程（A+）、轻工技术与工程（A+）两个顶尖学科，在相关领域具有全国领先地位。招生专业中食品科学与工程、食品质量与安全、食品营养与健康对应食品科学与工程A+学科；轻化工程、纺织工程、生物工程、酿酒工程对应轻工技术与工程A+学科，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏高，江南大学在上述领域开设计算机科学与技术、自动化、电气工程及其自动化、物联网工程等专业，契合当前热门方向。天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年的71938人增加约10062人，增幅约14%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。省控线数据2026年缺失，；江南大学位于江苏省无锡市，地处长三角经济发达区域，对天津考生具有一定地域吸引力。该校在天津市的招生计划占比较小（约118人），属于跨省招生中规模适中的院校，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划缩减4.1%、天津市考生总数大幅增加约14%以及学校排名稳步提升等多重因素，2026年江南大学在天津综合科类的最低录取位次预计在2025年基准10681名附近波动。招生计划缩减和考生总数增加共同推高竞争强度，而学校排名上升和声誉平稳则形成一定支撑。预测最低位次约10621名，区间10121–11121名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jiangnan University in Tianjin's comprehensive subject category were approximately 9601, 10116, 10093, 10160, and 10681, showing an overall fluctuating backward trend. From 2021 to 2022, the ranking moved back by about 515 places; from 2022 to 2023, it remained basically stable; from 2023 to 2024, it slightly moved back; from 2024 to 2025, it moved back by about 521 places, with the backward movement accelerating in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10681. The enrollment plan for Jiangnan University in Tianjin's comprehensive subject category was 125 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 123 students in 2024-2025, and further reduced to 118 students in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), a decrease of 5 students compared to 2025, a reduction of about 4.1%. The enrollment plan has been reduced for two consecutive years, creating a tightening effect on application competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jiangnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years: 65th in 2021, 59th in 2022, 60th in 2023, 55th in 2024, 51st in 2025, and 52nd in 2026, overall within the top 55 nationally, indicating steadily improving strength and comprehensive reputation. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was a slightly negative reputation signal (involving school management responses), but no significant negative public opinion appeared in the 2025-2026 cycle. The university's Douyin popularity ranking is 71st, rated as "average," with short video platform exposure at a moderate level, without high attention or obvious negative topics. No abnormal admission records related to Jiangnan University were found in historical data, and the admission trend is relatively stable. Jiangnan University has two top-tier disciplines: Food Science and Engineering (A+) and Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+), leading nationally in related fields. Among its majors, Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, and Food Nutrition and Health correspond to the A+ discipline of Food Science and Engineering; Light Chemical Engineering, Textile Engineering, Biological Engineering, and Brewing Engineering correspond to the A+ discipline of Light Industry Technology and Engineering, strongly attracting candidates interested in these directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity. Jiangnan University offers majors like Computer Science and Technology, Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Internet of Things Engineering in these fields, aligning with current hot directions. The total number of college entrance examination candidates in Tianjin in 2026 is approximately 82,000, an increase of about 10,062 from 71,938 in 2025, an increase of about 14%, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu Province, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some regional appeal to Tianjin candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin is relatively small (about 118 students), making it a moderately sized institution for cross-provincial enrollment, with limited influence from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, a 4.1% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 14% in the total number of Tianjin candidates, and the steady rise in the university's ranking, the minimum admission ranking for Jiangnan University in Tianjin's comprehensive subject category in 2026 is expected to fluctuate around the 2025 baseline of 10681. The reduction in enrollment plan and increase in candidate numbers jointly raise competition intensity, while the rising university ranking and stable reputation provide some support. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10621, with a range of 10121 to 11121.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 10121 to 11121 are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as their primary application direction, with Tier 1 majors as reach choices and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. Candidates with rankings better than 10121 (the lower limit of the range) can focus on reaching for popular engineering majors in Tier 1 such as Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Automation, as well as flagship majors like Food Science and Engineering (A+ discipline). Candidates with rankings around 10621 will find good value in Tier 2 majors such as Food Quality and Safety, Industrial Design, and Big Data Management and Application. Candidates with rankings close to 11121 are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors with A+ discipline evaluations like Light Chemical Engineering and Textile Engineering, as well as liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature and Law.
